---
name: Suggestion or Balance change
about: Propose a new idea, block, mechanic, or balance adjustment
title: '[SUGGESTION]: '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: 'LeinadHQ'

---

**Type of Suggestion**
- [ ] New Content (Turret, Material, Liquid, Unit, Block)
- [ ] Balance Change (Buff/Nerf stats of existing content)
- [ ] Quality of Life / Visual / Sprite improvement

**Description of the Idea**
A clear and concise description of what you want to be added or changed.

**Why is this needed? / What problem does it solve?**
Explain how this improves gameplay or what gap it fills in the mod (e.g., *Staccato feels too weak against high-tier units*, *We need a wall that blocks pierce bullets*, etc.).

**Proposed Stats / Mechanics (If applicable)**
If you have specific ideas for recipes, costs, damage, health, or behaviors, list them here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, reference screenshots, drawings, or concept art here.
